intro: A comical shooter where angels battle demons!
description:
Angel Rhapsody is a 2D shooting game.
Demons have possessed all kinds of things—hamburgers, sushi, Mount Rushmore, Mona Lisa, and more! Drive them back with an angel’s bow.

Defeat enemies to earn experience points and power up your angel! You can also strengthen mini angels that support your attacks.
Characters inspired by various countries such as the United States, Japan, the United Kingdom, and Germany make an appearance.
Conquer a variety of stages filled with famous classical music and traditional children’s songs.
